Headline: #12 Roosevelt buses Temporary Reroute near Roosevelt/Blue Island
ShortDescription: Westbound 12 Roosevelt buses are temporarily rerouted due to, police activity near Roosevelt/Blue Island.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #12 Roosevelt buses are temporarily rerouted via Roosevelt, Morgan, Taylor, Racine, Roosevelt and over regular route: due to, police activity near Roosevelt/Blue Island.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #79 79th buses Temporary Reroute at 79th/Emerald
ShortDescription: 79 79th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to construction near 79th/Emerald.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#79 79th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 79th, Vincennes, 76th, Ashland, 79th, then resume their normal route on 79th.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near 79th/Emerald.
